question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 12.00% on 2026-02-26 for the Metaculus question "Will Nvidia's stock price close below $100 on any day in 2026?"?
summary: Meta-prediction on whether the CP for "Will NVDA close below $100 in 2026?" will be strictly above 12% on Feb 26. The CP is currently exactly at 12% and has been stable there for 2+ days (18+ consecutive readings). The overall trend is strongly downward (25%→20%→15%→12% over 2 months). However, CP oscillated between 12% and 13% just 3 days ago, showing the boundary is porous. NVIDIA earnings on Feb 25 (one day before resolution) could trigger upward movement, but the resolution check at 3:50 AM ET limits post-earnings updates. The downward trend and stability at 0.12 slightly favor NO, but the proximity to threshold and upcoming earnings catalyst keep YES probability meaningful.

factors.description: Strong persistent downward CP trend: 25% → 20% → 15% → 12% over 2 months, suggesting continued decline or stability
CP has been stable at exactly 0.12 for 18+ consecutive readings over last 2 days, showing no upward drift
NVDA at $180, needs 44% drop to $100 — fundamentals increasingly favor lower CP as time passes in 2026
762 forecasters makes the CP very stable and resistant to random perturbation from individual forecasters
Meta-question thresholds are auto-generated near current CP, creating ~50% structural base rate by construction
CP oscillated between 0.12 and 0.13 just 2-3 days ago (Feb 14-15), showing the boundary is easily crossable
NVIDIA Q4 earnings on Feb 25 (day before resolution) — any negative surprise could push CP upward. Even anticipatory movement possible.
Resolution at 3:50 AM ET limits post-earnings CP updates, favoring pre-earnings status quo (currently 0.12)
